003 * contributor license agreements.  See the NOTICE file distributed with
004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the
006 * "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with the
007 * License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.http.header;
018
019
020import static java.time.format.DateTimeFormatter.*;
021import static java.time.temporal.ChronoUnit.*;
022import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Shorts.*;
023
024import java.time.*;
025import java.util.*;
026import java.util.function.*;
027
028/**
029 * Base for HTTP-date headers.
030 *
031 * @since 9.2.1
032 */
033@SuppressWarnings({
034   "java:S2160", // equals() on HttpHeaderBean uses name + getValue(); typed state is reflected in getValue()
035   "unchecked" // Supplier<?> branches cast to typed suppliers after lazy-mode check
036})
037public class HttpDateHeader extends HttpHeaderBean {
038
039   public static final int LAZY_WIRE_STRING = 0;
040   public static final int LAZY_ZONED_DATE_TIME = 1;
041
042   private final ZonedDateTime cachedZdt;
043   private final Supplier<?> lazySupplier;
044   private final int lazyMode;
045
046   /**
047    * Creates an {@link HttpDateHeader} by parsing the given RFC-1123 wire-format value.
048    *
049    * @param name Header name. Must not be {@code null}.
050    * @param wireValue Wire value (e.g. {@code "Sun, 06 Nov 1994 08:49:37 GMT"}). May be {@code null} or empty.
051    * @return A new instance. Never {@code null}.
052    */
053   public static HttpDateHeader of(String name, String wireValue) {
054      return new HttpDateHeader(name, wireValue);
055   }
056
057   /**
058    * Creates an {@link HttpDateHeader} with the given typed value.
059    *
060    * @param name Header name. Must not be {@code null}.
061    * @param typedValue The date value. May be {@code null}.
062    * @return A new instance. Never {@code null}.
063    */
064   public static HttpDateHeader of(String name, ZonedDateTime typedValue) {
065      return new HttpDateHeader(name, typedValue);
066   }
067
068   protected HttpDateHeader(String name, String value) {
069      super(name, (String)null);
070      this.cachedZdt = ie(value) ? null : parseHttpDate(value);
071      this.lazySupplier = null;
072      this.lazyMode = -1;
073   }
074
075   protected HttpDateHeader(String name, ZonedDateTime value) {
076      super(name, (String)null);
077      this.cachedZdt = value;
078      this.lazySupplier = null;
079      this.lazyMode = -1;
080   }
081
082   protected HttpDateHeader(String name, Supplier<?> supplier, int lazyMode) {
083      super(name, lazyMode == LAZY_WIRE_STRING
084         ? ((Supplier<String>) supplier)::get
085         : () -> {
086            var z = ((Supplier<ZonedDateTime>) supplier).get();
087            if (z == null)
088               return null;
089            return RFC_1123_DATE_TIME.format(z);
090         });
091      this.cachedZdt = null;
092      this.lazySupplier = supplier;
093      this.lazyMode = lazyMode;
094   }
095
096   public Optional<ZonedDateTime> asZonedDateTime() {
097      return o(toZonedDateTime());
098   }
099
100   @Override
101   public String getValue() {
102      if (lazyMode == LAZY_ZONED_DATE_TIME) {
103         var x = ((Supplier<ZonedDateTime>) lazySupplier).get();
104         return x == null ? null : RFC_1123_DATE_TIME.format(x);
105      }
106      if (cachedZdt != null)
107         return RFC_1123_DATE_TIME.format(cachedZdt);
108      return super.getValue();
109   }
110
111   public ZonedDateTime orElse(ZonedDateTime other) {
112      var x = toZonedDateTime();
113      return nn(x) ? x : other;
114   }
115
116   public ZonedDateTime toZonedDateTime() {
117      if (lazyMode == LAZY_ZONED_DATE_TIME)
118         return ((Supplier<ZonedDateTime>) lazySupplier).get();
119      if (cachedZdt != null)
120         return cachedZdt;
121      var v = super.getValue();
122      return ie(v) ? null : parseHttpDate(v);
123   }
124
125   private static ZonedDateTime parseHttpDate(String value) {
126      return ZonedDateTime.from(RFC_1123_DATE_TIME.parse(value)).truncatedTo(SECONDS);
127   }
128}
